root.sql:
select ( case tab.group_item when 'LON' then trim( loan_type_des ) when 'LCC' then 'ค่าปรับเงินกู้' else tab.item_type_name end ) as case_item_type_name,tab.* from ( SELECT sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item as group_item ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name
,sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount ,sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount ,sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) as item_amount ,count( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) as c_count
,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_name as branch_name
,sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id as item_type_id , (CASE sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item WHEN 'LON' THEN FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type )) ELSE sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name END) as loan_type_des
FROM sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_com_m_branch ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,si_security_user
,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid ,sc_lon_m_rule
WHERE sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id
and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type
and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and si_security_user.user_id = sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = 'CSH' /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item ,(CASE sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item WHEN 'LON' THEN FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type )) ELSE sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name END) ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_name ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name )tab

r_ktm_receipt_payment_sum_clr_cash_nest.sql:
SELECT tab_data.account_id, tab_data.account_name, tab_data.loan_type, tab_data.loan_type_description, tab_data.principal_amount, tab_data.interest_amount, tab_data.item_amount from ( /* เงินกู้ */ SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date
FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( FPB_GET_KEEP_ACCOUNT_ID( 'ML' , sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no , sc_com_m_receipt_item.description , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money in ( 'CSH' ) GROUP BY sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date
union
SELECT sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as account_id , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as account_name , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as loan_type , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as loan_type_description , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date
FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item <> 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money in ( 'CSH' ) GROUP BY sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date
) tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day
where sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = tab_data.receipt_date and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = {0}
